mapper.select: SELECT tmpl_cd, tmpl_nm, tmpl_cn, use_yn, rgtr_id, last_mdfr_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_dt FROM approval_template WHERE use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT am.aprvl_doc_sn, am.aprvl_doc_sj, am.tmpl_cd, am.drft_user_id, am.drft_reg_dt, am.aprvl_prgrs_cd, am.mdfcn_dt, atm.tmpl_nm FROM APPROVAL_MASTER am LEFT JOIN approval_template atm ON am.tmpl_cd = atm.tmpl_cd WHERE am.drft_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY am.drft_reg_dt DESC

SELECT al.aprvl_line_sn, al.aprvl_doc_sn, al.aprvl_ordr, al.aprvr_user_id, al.aprvl_prgrs_cd, al.aprvl_dt, am.aprvl_doc_sj, am.tmpl_cd, am.drft_user_id, am.drft_reg_dt, am.aprvl_prgrs_cd AS doc_prgrs_cd FROM APPROVAL_LINE al JOIN APPROVAL_MASTER am ON al.aprvl_doc_sn = am.aprvl_doc_sn WHERE al.aprvr_user_id = #{userId} AND al.aprvl_prgrs_cd = 'IN_PROGRESS' ORDER BY am.drft_reg_dt DESC

SELECT al.aprvl_line_sn, al.aprvl_doc_sn, al.aprvl_ordr, al.aprvr_user_id, al.aprvl_prgrs_cd, al.aprvl_dt, am.aprvl_doc_sj, am.tmpl_cd, am.drft_user_id, am.drft_reg_dt, am.aprvl_prgrs_cd AS doc_prgrs_cd FROM APPROVAL_LINE al JOIN APPROVAL_MASTER am ON al.aprvl_doc_sn = am.aprvl_doc_sn WHERE al.aprvr_user_id = #{userId} AND al.aprvl_prgrs_cd IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY al.aprvl_dt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPROVAL_MASTER (APRVL_DOC_SJ, APRVL_DOC_CN, DRFT_USER_ID, APRVL_PRGRS_CD, TMPL_CD, DRFT_REG_DT, MDFCN_DT) VALUES ( #{aprvlDocSj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlDocCn,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{drftUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aprvlPrgrsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tmplCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT am.*, m.user_name AS drft_user_nm, d.dept_nm AS drft_dept_nm, jg.jbgr_nm AS drft_jbgr_nm, atm.tmpl_nm FROM approval_master am JOIN member m ON am.drft_user_id = m.user_id JOIN employee_info ei ON am.drft_user_id = ei.user_id JOIN department d ON ei.dept_cd = d.dept_cd JOIN job_grade jg ON ei.jbgr_cd = jg.jbgr_cd LEFT JOIN approval_template atm ON am.tmpl_cd = atm.tmpl_cd WHERE am.aprvl_doc_sn = #{aprvlDocSn}

SELECT al.aprvl_line_sn, al.aprvl_doc_sn, al.aprvl_ordr, al.aprvr_user_id, al.aprvl_dt, al.aprvl_prgrs_cd, al.aprvl_rsn_cn, m.user_name AS approver_name, jg.jbgr_nm, jg.sort_ord, d.dept_nm FROM APPROVAL_LINE al JOIN MEMBER m ON al.aprvr_user_id = m.user_id JOIN EMPLOYEE_INFO ei ON al.aprvr_user_id = ei.user_id JOIN JOB_GRADE jg ON ei.jbgr_cd = jg.jbgr_cd JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON ei.dept_cd = d.dept_cd WHERE al.aprvl_doc_sn = #{aprvlDocSn} AND al.aprvl_prgrs_cd != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY al.aprvl_ordr
mapper.update: UPDATE APPROVAL_MASTER SET aprvl_doc_sj = #{aprvlDocSj,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aprvl_doc_cn = #{aprvlDocCn,jdbcType=CLOB}, aprvl_prgrs_cd = #{aprvlPrgrsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tmpl_cd = #{tmplCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mdfcn_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE aprvl_doc_sn = #{aprvlDocSn}

UPDATE approval_line SET aprvl_prgrs_cd = #{aprvlPrgrsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, aprvl_dt = CASE WHEN #{aprvlPrgrsCd} IN ('APPROVED','REJECTED') THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE aprvl_dt END, aprvl_rsn_cn = #{aprvlRsnCn,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE aprvl_line_sn = #{aprvlLineSn}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APPROVAL_LINE WHERE aprvl_prgrs_cd = 'IN_PROGRESS'
